title: R0-4
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Droid |type= |image= |name=R0-4 |homeworld= |birth= |death= |creator= |manufacturer= |line= |model= |class=[[Protocol droid/Legends|Protocol droid]] |cost= |length= |width= |height= |mass= |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Masculine programming]] |pronouns=new |sensor= |plating= |armament= |equipment= |affiliation=[[Koth Melan]] }} {{Quote|Okay, Goldie. My name is Man with a Blaster About to Cook You. Either you open the door or your busy Bothan is going to have to get himself a new receptionist.''"
"''Oh, dear.''"
"''And no security alarms, either. I'm watching you real carefully. Up, and do the door manually.''"
"''Very well, Man with a Blaster About to Cook You.|Dash Rendar and R0-4|[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' novel]]}} '''R0-4''', or '''R-Zero-Four''', was a [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] working as secretary of [[Koth Melan]] on the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] home-world of [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]]. His metal skin was polished to a gleaming gold. Like all protocol droids, R0-4 could be very literal and inconvenient. When [[Dash Rendar/Legends|Dash Rendar]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] visited Koth Melan to discuss the message he sent to [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]], R0-4 could not allow them to enter since they were not either Leia herself or had an appointment to visit Melan. Seeing that this would lead them nowhere, Dash pointed his blaster on him and introduced to him as the "Man with a Blaster About to Cook You". R0 brought them to Koth. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' novel]] {{1st|in book}} *[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (abridged audiobook)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' abridged audiobook]] *[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (junior novelization)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' junior novelization]] ==Sources== *{{Topps|set=1996 Topps Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire|cardname=Dash's Persuasive Charm|link=https://www.rebelscum.com/photo.asp?image=/sote/soteTC032.jpg}} {{Imo}} *{{GalaxyCite|9|Filling in the Shadows}} {{Imo}} *''[[Star Wars: The Art of the Brothers Hildebrandt]]'' {{Imo}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=R04 }} [[Category:Protocol droids]]
